title: Event Envelope (DRAFT — Phase 0 skeleton)
$comment: Append-only JSONL record. Source of truth for audit + replay. Never rewritten. Finalize in Phase 1.

stream.description: Which JSONL stream this belongs to.

kind.description: Event kind, e.g. captured, note_created, note_updated, fact_added, fact_superseded, indexed.

actor.description: Who caused it: human | cli | skill:<name> | sidecar:<name>. Never silent.
